items.title: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services
items.summary_for_review: Curated pointer to the CAC publication of interim measures governing generative AI services in China. Supports governance review of whether China-facing product, content moderation, and provider obligations may need tracking against official CAC text. Primary authoritative text is in Chinese; verify scope and dates on the source.

key_dates.label: Measures effective date (pending verification on CAC source)
key_dates.notes: Commonly cited effective date; confirm on official CAC publication before client use.

items.legal_safe_note: Curated registry record for governance review support only. Not legal advice. Does not cover all PRC AI-related rules. Requires human review of official Chinese text and any subsequent amendments before client use.

items.title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 — Artificial Intelligence Act
items.summary_for_review: Manual sample record linking to the EU AI Act instrument on EUR-Lex (CELEX 32024R1689). Supports governance review of whether AI system registers, risk processes, and vendor documentation may need alignment with tracked EU requirements. v0.8.9: Commission AI Act overview page corroborates instrument identity; EUR-Lex full text still requires human browser review (automated access limited). Dates below are illustrative — verify on official sources before client use.

key_dates.label: Regulation published in Official Journal (sample — verify on EUR-Lex)
key_dates.notes: Tracked date for data-model testing; confirm on official source.

key_dates.label: General application start (sample — verify phased obligations on source)
key_dates.notes: Many obligations phase in over time; do not treat this single date as complete guidance.

items.legal_safe_note: Manual sample record for data-model testing only. Not legal advice. Does not describe complete EU AI Act obligations or national implementations. Requires human review before client use.

items.title: Australia's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Ethics Framework
items.summary_for_review: Curated pointer to the Australian Government’s AI Ethics Framework publication on industry.gov.au. Supports governance review of whether voluntary ethics principles referenced in internal policies or vendor questionnaires need refresh when official materials are updated.
items.legal_safe_note: Curated registry record for governance review support only. Not legal advice. Voluntary framework; binding obligations may arise under other Australian laws. Requires human verification on industry.gov.au before client use.

items.title: Kunstig intelligens og personvern (Datatilsynet)
items.summary_for_review: Manual sample record pointing to Datatilsynet's official AI and privacy theme hub (Norwegian). Supports governance review of DPIAs, transparency information, and lawful-basis documentation where AI processes personal data. Subpages cover recommendations, DPIA guidance, and tools — verify current pages on the official URL before client use. Not a substitute for reading applicable law or qualified advice.
items.legal_safe_note: Manual sample record for data-model testing only. Not legal advice. Norway is not part of the EU; EEA context may apply to some EU rules separately. Requires human review before client use.

items.title: EU AI Office — General-purpose AI (GPAI) framework pages (sample pointer)
items.summary_for_review: Manual sample record pointing to Commission / EU AI Office material on the AI regulatory framework, including GPAI-related implementation topics. Helps identify when new or updated official guidance may warrant governance review of model documentation, provider due diligence, or internal policy memos. Content on the live page may change; this summary is not a substitute for reading the source.
items.legal_safe_note: Manual sample record for data-model testing only. Not legal advice. Requires human review before client use. Does not automatically determine which GPAI obligations apply to a specific system.

items.title: G7 — Hiroshima AI Process (summit policy framework)

items.legal_safe_note: Curated registry record for governance review support only. Not legal advice. G7 declarations are political commitments, not directly enforceable law. Summit site may be archived; verify current G7 publications before client use.

items.legal_safe_note: Curated registry record for governance review support only. Not legal advice. English hub may not list all binding instruments; verify Japanese official sources where required. Requires human review before client use.
